/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/sentry_sat_sim.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sentry_sat_sim.dir/src/memory_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sentry_sat_sim.dir/src/inference_engine.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/sentry_sat_sim.dir/Users/ashura/Desktop/Project/Sentry-Sat/security_enclave/src/puf_simulator.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/sentry_sat_sim.dir/Users/ashura/Desktop/Project/Sentry-Sat/security_enclave/src/crypto_signer.cpp.o" -o sentry_sat_sim  /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.0/lib/libcrypto.dylib
